brief.guidance: Use for status checks, scope routing, and summary-first resume. Prefer context-pack over opening Markdown.

execute.guidance: Use for implementation and task execution. Load task packs, run concrete validation, and avoid broad exploration.

review.guidance: Use for review and certification. Favor evidence, checks, and regression fixtures over new feature work.

close.guidance: Use for sprint close, retro, and wrap-up materialization. Quality gates matter more than speed.
